notes: The non-obvious one: a DO has exactly one alarm. The run multiplexes both timers by storing each job's next-due time and arming the single alarm to Math.min(...), recomputing with a drift-free nextOccurrence() in alarm() and re-arming to the soonest.
experiment: This run is the WITH-gotchas arm of an A/B test (with vs without the documented gotchas). See the secret gist report linked in README.md.
